dialogue_text: Tal Hajus knows that you are here, John Carter,
source_excerpt: "Tal Hajus knows that you are here, John Carter," said Tars Tarkas, on his return from the jeddak's quarters; "Sarkoja saw and recognized you as we were returning. Tal Hajus has ordered me to bring you before him tonight. I have ten thoa...

dialogue_text: Sarkoja saw and recognized you as we were returning. Tal Hajus has ordered me to bring you before him tonight. I have ten thoats, John Carter; you may take your choice from among them, and I will accompany you to the nearest waterway that leads to Helium. Tars Tarkas may be a cruel green warrior, but he can be a friend as well. Come, we must start.
source_excerpt: "Tal Hajus knows that you are here, John Carter," said Tars Tarkas, on his return from the jeddak's quarters; "Sarkoja saw and recognized you as we were returning. Tal Hajus has ordered me to bring you before him tonight. I have ten thoa...

dialogue_text: And when you return, Tars Tarkas?
source_excerpt: "And when you return, Tars Tarkas?" I asked.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
